Arts Facilitator · Cairo, Egypt

Hend Hashemmakes space to play.

I design and facilitate participatory arts experiences — theatre, movement, storytelling, and play — that help communities express, connect, and change.

Who I am

A facilitator and workshop designer building safe, participatory spaces for youth, refugees, children, and adults.

My practice blends artistic tools with psychological and community-development approaches. I'm trained in applied theatre, interactive drama, psychodrama, movement expression, storytelling, and art-therapy facilitation.

Whether it's a forum theatre piece on gender equality in Aswan, a psychosocial workshop with Sudanese refugee women, or a nature camp for six-year-olds, the work is the same at heart: design the conditions, then hand people the room to express themselves.

— Facilitating with young participants, Mortagal
The toolbox

Methods I work with

Applied Theatre / Forum Theatre / Image Theatre / Interactive Drama / Psychodrama / Playback Theatre / Movement Expression / Storytelling / Clown & Buffoon / Commedia dell'Arte / Collage / Clay Modelling / Drama Games / Gamification / Non-Violent Communication / Art-Therapy Facilitation

On the ground

15+Projects since 2024
2026
Subject Leader — Drama, Movement & Play
The Village · Back to Nature Camp
Led drama, movement and exploratory play for two age groups (4–6 and 7–9), designing nature-inspired creative activities that foster imagination and self-expression.
+
2025
Interactive Theatre for Gender Equality
Mortagal × Nisa' El Ganoub — Aswan
Travelled to Aswan to facilitate interactive theatre on gender equality with adults, applying Forum Theatre and Image Theatre to explore community-specific challenges.
+
2025
Psychosocial Support for Sudanese Refugee Women
Mortagal × Sanad (Itijah)
Led psychosocial workshops using interactive theatre, collage, clay modelling and drawing as creative tools for emotional release.
+
2025
Performing Arts for Youth — Programme Designer & Lead
Mortagal × Maqaad El Sultan
Designed and delivered a full arts programme for children and adolescents covering Image Theatre, Clown & Buffoon, and Commedia dell'Arte.
+
2025
Entrepreneurship Camp for Children
Mortagal × The John D. Gerhart Center, AUC
Managed a full children's camp (ages 6–9) introducing entrepreneurship concepts through board games and card games as primary learning tools.
+
2025
Movement Expression & Collage Workshop
Mortagal × Dawar for Arts Festival
Designed and facilitated a workshop for adults combining movement expression and collage-making, presented as part of the Dawar for Arts Festival.
+
2025
Gamification & Arts for Social Changemakers
Mortagal × Ambassadors of Dialogue
Facilitated a workshop blending gamification and arts-based approaches for adults working on community-development initiatives.
+

Drama Games for Children
Mortagal × Alwan wa Awtar
Facilitated drama-games workshops across two groups: early childhood and pre-adolescent children.
+

Interactive Theatre — Mixed Group
Mortagal × Sanad Foundation
Facilitated interactive theatre sessions for a mixed group of adolescents and adults.
+
2024–25
SRH Manual — Activity Writer
Mortagal × Dawar for Arts
Co-developed facilitation activities for a Sexual & Reproductive Health manual over a year-long project, contributing to activity design and content ideation.
+
2024
Interactive Theatre for Adolescents
Mortagal × Sanad Foundation
Co-facilitated storytelling and the creation of an interactive theatre piece with adolescents deprived of parental care, using narrative and participatory arts to support emotional expression.
